definition: entity within a measuring instrument that plays a specific role and which can be handled separately if necessary

definition_ml.en: entity within a measuring instrument that plays a specific role and which can be handled separately if necessary
definition_ml.fr: composant pouvant faire partie intégrante d'une jauge, un transmetteur ou un commutateur et/ou un composant individuel d'un assemblage de mesure
definition_ml.de: Einheit innerhalb eines Messgeräts, die eine spezifische Aufgabe erfüllt und, sofern erforderlich, getrennt gehandhabt werden kann

note: EXAMPLES: Thermowell within a temperature assembly, remote seal for a pressure transmitter

note_ml.en: EXAMPLES: Thermowell within a temperature assembly, remote seal for a pressure transmitter
